backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Product, Order, CustomOrderRequest, ReturnRequest, WishlistItem) and CRUD operations for a crochet e-commerce backend, with admin passcode-gated mutations and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single completed feature: removing the SVG icon and its wrapping span from the first button in the Navbar component's header top-left area.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON mapping of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each component's purpose, covering cart, checkout, admin, pages, and layout components for the knotankey storefront.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'knotankey', loading the Nunito 700 Google Font, and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, products, cart, checkout, admin, etc.), wraps the layout in CartProvider, and shows a 2.2-second loading screen on initial render.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminCusto: Admin component that fetches and displays custom order requests in a responsive card grid, showing details like product type, size, color, budget, and an optional inspiration image.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminOrder: Admin component that lists all orders sorted by date and allows updating each order's status via a dropdown select, with loading/error states and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProdu: Admin component for full CRUD management of products, featuring a dialog form for creating/editing products with image upload support and a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminRetur: Admin component that fetches and displays return requests in a list, showing order ID, email, reason badge with color coding, date, and optional description.
Slide-in cart drawer component that displays cart items, total price, and buttons to navigate to checkout or the full cart page, with body scroll locking when open.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItem.ts: Individual cart item row component showing product image, title, price, a quantity selector, line total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderSu: Read-only checkout sidebar component that lists cart items with thumbnails, quantities, and prices, then shows subtotal, free shipping, and the final total.
frontend/src/components/home/AboutSectio: Renders an animated 'Our Story' section with a parallax background image, dark gradient overlay, and fade-in text triggered by an intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/home/BestSellers: Displays a grid of best-selling products fetched via a custom query hook, with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a 'View All Products' navigation button.
frontend/src/components/home/CTABanner.t: A call-to-action banner with a scale/fade-in animation on scroll visibility, prompting users to explore all products via a styled link.
frontend/src/components/home/FloatingYar: Renders a canvas-based animation of softly drifting radial gradient orbs to create a subtle floating yarn visual effect in the hero section.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: Full-screen hero section with a parallax scrolling background, floating yarn canvas animation, staggered fade-in text, and a 'Shop Now' CTA link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand description, social media links (Instagram, Pinterest, email), and a navigation grid, rendered with a warm linen gradient background.
frontend/src/components/layout/MusicTogg: A play/pause button component that lazily initializes an audio element and fades background music in/out using a stepped interval approach.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, centered desktop nav links with active underline indicators, a cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: A newsletter signup form component that validates email input and shows toast notifications on success or error, resetting after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading overlay displaying an animated yarn ball SVG, the 'knotankey' brand name, and a bouncing dots indicator shown during the initial app load delay.
frontend/src/components/product-detail/Q: A numeric quantity selector component with increment/decrement buttons, enforcing configurable min/max bounds.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying a product image with bestseller badge, title, category, INR-formatted price, a quick-add-to-cart button, and a link to the product detail page.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (add, update, remove, clear) with localStorage persistence and derived itemCount and total values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Hook that uses IntersectionObserver to return a boolean indicating whether a referenced element has entered the viewport, disconnecting after first intersection.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductFilters.ts: Hook that memoizes filtering and sorting of a product list based on category, price range, bestseller flag, and sort order.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products and orders against the ICP backend actor, including queries and mutations with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining a soft luxury beige/cream CSS variable palette, custom animations, and base body styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with passcode authentication that provides tabbed management views for products, orders, custom orders, and return requests.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items and an order summary with total price, with navigation to checkout or back to products.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a shipping information form that creates an order via mutation, clears the cart, and redirects to a thank-you page on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: Custom order request page with a form for product type, size, color, budget, description, and optional inspiration image upload, submitted to the backend via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes the Hero, Best Sellers, About, and CTA Banner sections into a single layout.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a product by ID, displays its image, details, and quantity selector, and supports add-to-cart and buy-now actions.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable, searchable product listing page with category badges and price range filters, fetching products via a custom query hook and rendering them as ProductCard components.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnsPage.tsx: Renders a returns and exchanges page with policy info cards and a form to submit return requests (order ID, email, reason, description) via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/ThankYouPage.tsx: Post-order confirmation page that displays the order ID, a secure payment-via-email notice, and next-steps info with animated fade-in on mount.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Exports a single `formatINR` utility function that formats a number as Indian Rupees using the Intl.NumberFormat API with Indian comma notation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (cream, warm), fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), shadows, border radii, animations, and plugin integrations (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing features, and a single completed feature request to remove an SVG icon from a Navbar header button.
